Acme Careers All jobs

Senior Backend Engineer

Acme is a fast-growing company building developer tooling used by thousands of engineering teams around the world. We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our platform group and help us scale our distributed systems.

What you'll do

  • Design, build, and operate backend services in TypeScript running on Cloudflare Workers.
  • Own the reliability and performance of our data ingestion pipeline.
  • Collaborate with product and design to ship customer-facing features end to end.
  • Mentor other engineers and raise the bar for engineering quality across the team.

What we're looking for

  • 5+ years of professional backend engineering experience.
  • Strong proficiency with TypeScript and modern JavaScript runtimes.
  • Experience operating production services at scale, including observability and on-call.
  • Familiarity with edge platforms, SQL databases, and event-driven architectures.

Compensation

The salary range for this role is $150,000 to $190,000 per year, depending on experience, plus equity and benefits. This position is fully remote within the US.

To apply, submit your resume and a short note about why this role interests you.

Acme Inc. Equal opportunity employer.
